Rutgers Center for Adult Autism Services (RCAAS)

RCAAS offers adults on the autism spectrum support programs that make an independent and fulfilling life possible.

PSC is a specialty training clinic and unit within GSAPP. Directed by Dr. Joshua Cohen, the PSC operates with a two-fold mission: to provide clinical services to adults on the autism spectrum.

SCALE is the RCAAS flagship day services program led by Director, James Maraventano, EdD, BCBA-D, that focuses on supporting success in all aspects of adult life.

New Brunswick, NJ

Autism Diagnostic Training ADHD Clinic
